# RestaurantWebsite

A full-stack web application for a restaurant similar to McDonald's.

## Generated by Code Vibe

This project was automatically generated by Code Vibe AI Website Builder.

### Features
- Responsive design
- Dynamic menu display
- Location finder
- Contact form with validation
- Promotional content on homepage

### Tech Stack
- frontend: {'framework': 'React', 'styling': 'Tailwind CSS', 'language': 'JavaScript/JSX', 'other': ['React Router', 'Axios']}
- backend: {'framework': 'Express.js', 'language': 'Node.js / JavaScript', 'other': ['cors', 'dotenv', 'body-parser']}
- database: SQLite
